name: BTC Failed Breakdown Hold v1
thesis: BTC 4h can reward failed breakdown reclaims that hold instead of instantly reverting. The edge should come from reclaim plus hold persistence, then scaling out as follow-through proves itself.
edge_mechanism: failed breakdown reclaim followed by hold persistence
invalidation_condition: Abort if hold persistence cannot generate enough participation or if post-cost edge does not survive walk-forward testing.

long: Trail remaining 25% by 0.8 * ATR_14 after first partial
short: Trail remaining 25% by 0.8 * ATR_14 after first partial
